description: CompositionCharcoal coloured full length formal trousers, with flat front, two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back, brand patch above right hip pocket and has reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area and the hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash cold Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron A famous saying goes - "A man's class is raised by a bar with the trousers he wears". The man of substance always chooses his formal trousers with much care, and scullers makes it all the more easier with its classsy range of formal trousers. Designed with the choicest of selected fabrics, it makes for a perfect daily office wear. Pair it with classic formal shirts and leather shoes to look every bit like the corporate that you are.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41.5"Height-6.1", waist-31"
